message:
feat: restructure genome to per-project data directories

Move sessions, logs, and memory under per-project directories:
$GENOME/projects/$PROJECT_SLUG/{sessions,logs,memory}/

Key changes:
- Add SPROUT_PROJECT_DATA_DIR env var threaded through all layers
  (CLI -> SessionController -> Factory -> Agent -> Spawner -> agent-process)
- Project slug mirrors Claude Code convention (path separators -> hyphens)
- Directory initialization lives in library layer (factory + agent-process),
  not the CLI
- Genome .gitignore now excludes projects/ directory
- task-manager CLI prefers SPROUT_PROJECT_DATA_DIR with genomePath fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
